selected_lane: ADR0045 Account Console contract-first UI route acceptance check for P077 E90

ui_route_coverage_matrix.authority: route implementation must have proposal-level UI design, UI acceptance, matrix update and browser evidence before closeout

contract_first_ui_topic.authority: implementation workflow requires panel-level UI Slice Contract, anti-drift checklist and owner boundary before coding

blocker.reason: E90 provides the required read-only P077 Paper slice contract and fixture, but the UI route or parent Account Workbench panel has not yet been accepted through proposal-level ui-design.md, ui-acceptance.md, route coverage matrix mapping and browser/render evidence.
blocker.retry_condition: Create or update an Account Console proposal/change for the P077 Paper Slice Evidence Panel under the Account Workbench route hierarchy. It must fill the UI Slice Contract, anti-drift checklist, owner boundary, route matrix row or parent route mapping, and browser/render acceptance before frontend implementation can be accepted.

rejection_rules: Reject any UI rendering that treats E90 fixture data as runtime truth, ledger truth, readiness truth, admission truth, broker tradability or capital truth.
Reject implementing /orders/p077-paper-slice as a new top-level route without route hierarchy acceptance.
Reject closing the UI lane from contract/fixture evidence alone without browser/render evidence or a typed blocker.
Reject any order action control, submit/cancel/replace affordance, or wording that implies Paper ready, Live ready, admitted, production ready, capital allocated or can trade.
next_action: Land a proposal-level Account Console UI slice contract for the P077 Paper Slice Evidence Panel, then implement a read-only panel with browser evidence.
